composio_raw.name: Salesforce
composio_raw.description: Salesforce is a leading CRM platform integrating sales, service, marketing, and analytics to build customer relationships and drive business growth

llm_raw.description: A comprehensive enterprise-grade e-commerce platform providing cloud-based solutions for B2C and B2B online storefronts.
llm_raw.notes: Information based on industry knowledge and Composio registry data due to transient fetch failure; platform requires enterprise-level partnership/contract to access sandbox environments.
